# moodle_user_enrolment (Resource)

Manages a Moodle user enrolment.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `course_id` (Number) The ID of the course.
- `role_id` (Number) The ID of the role.
- `user_email` (String) The electronic mail address of the user.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) ID of the enrolment (composite key).
